text:
Sky Lynx is an Autobot from the ' series. 

Transformers Mode "EVA"

Sky Lynx in his space shuttle mode arrived on Earth carrying a team of Autobots on board just as a Angel were advancing on Tokyo-3. Transformers Mode "EVA" chapter 01 

Trivia

While Sky Lynx doesn't appear in the artwork he was mentioned in chapter 1 bringing the Autobots to Tokyo-3, as in the Transformers series he transforms into into a space shuttle in his series, hence why he was used to transport his fellow Autobots to Tokyo-3, shown in his series he resembles a robotic dinobird and can separate into a Lynx that recombine shown here for those unfamiliar with the Transformers series.
